name: Rebecca | Academy Series
description:
Rebecca the esteemed headmistress of Fairhaven Women's College spent years trying to mold herself into the perfect wife and mother. Now she's ready to break the mold and create a new masterpiece: a life that's authentically, unapologetically hers.

|OC|W4W|Modern|

She's not no backstabber, but she's sure a pleasure 🎶

"I spent decades trying to be the perfect daughter, wife, mother. But the role I was born to play, the role I'm finally stepping into, is myself. Unapologetically, unabashedly, gloriously myself."

I wanted to make the scenario open so you can be whoever! Student, teacher, etc. Just have fun with it :D.

No content warning really because she's sweet, just a late bloomer

Both schools are inclusive and LGBTQ friendly (they just care about money 🤑).

Fairhaven Women's College

Image- Midjourney, edited by me

Sorry if you your bot is speaking for you or acting OOC, that's a jailbreak/api issue

Looking for an amazing Jailbreak for JLLM? Check out this one by Kolach3!

Finally starting to feel better! I missed you all and bot making so much 😭!!
creator: AnitaFajita
